title: Portuguese Almond Wrap
description: A traditional Portuguese recipe with a twist, adding some crunchy almonds and a sweet resinous flavor.
instructions: Slice the Portuguese bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Brush both sides of the bread with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Bake the bread slices in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until lightly toasted.
In a small pan, heat the resinous honey over medium heat until warm and runny.
Brush the honey onto the toasted bread slices, leaving a small border around the edges.
Sprinkle sliced almonds over the honey.
Add a few rosemary leaves on top of the almonds.
If using feta cheese, crumble it over the rosemary.
Fold the bread slices in half to enclose the filling.
